portrait.suffix: studio lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/1.8, neutral background
portrait.negative: blurry, distorted, low quality, watermark, deformed face

product.suffix: clean white background, soft studio lighting, commercial quality, high detail
product.negative: cluttered background, shadows, text overlay, low resolution

landscape.suffix: golden hour lighting, wide angle lens, high dynamic range, vivid colors, 4K
landscape.negative: watermark, text, people, urban elements, oversaturated

illustration.suffix: clean lines, vibrant colors, professional quality, detailed

logo.suffix: clean geometry, flat colors, professional, scalable, centered composition
logo.negative: photorealistic, complex textures, gradients, 3D, busy background

ui-mockup.suffix: clean layout, consistent spacing, professional typography, subtle shadows

browser-product.suffix: minimalistic, flat design, clean UI, refined browser frame, subtle light background, airy spacing, strong crop on the key component
browser-product.negative: invented UI, fake buttons, fake labels, rewritten copy, cluttered layout, neon gradients, distorted text

feed-card.prefix: Product marketing image for social feed,
feed-card.suffix: 16:9 composition, clean UI, minimalistic, stronger focal crop, safe margins, subtle depth, minimal or no text overlays
feed-card.negative: invented UI, fake labels, fake cards, rewritten copy, cluttered composition, neon gradients, distorted text

artistic.suffix: masterful brushwork, rich colors, dramatic lighting, gallery quality
artistic.negative: digital artifacts, pixelated, amateur, low resolution

cinematic.suffix: smooth camera movement, film grain, anamorphic lens, 24fps, dramatic lighting
cinematic.negative: shaky camera, low quality, fast cuts, amateur

portrait_anim.suffix: subtle natural movement, soft lighting, shallow depth of field, steady camera
portrait_anim.negative: exaggerated motion, morphing, distortion, rapid movement

nature.suffix: slow motion, macro detail, natural lighting, vivid colors
nature.negative: artificial, CGI look, fast motion, shaky

product_anim.suffix: smooth 360 rotation, clean background, studio lighting, professional

aerial.suffix: smooth sweeping motion, bird's eye view, golden hour, cinematic color grade

slowmo.suffix: 120fps smoothness, crisp detail, dramatic timing, shallow depth of field
